title: sida rhombifolia subsp. retusa
intro: Sida rhombifolia subsp. retusa, also known as the Rhombic Sida, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its rhombic-shaped leaves and medicinal properties. This plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Sida rhombifolia subsp. retusa include wound healing, reducing inflammation and fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida rhombifolia subsp. retusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
